staleness_log.details: All 5 holes pre-dated by subsequent patches. Holes 1 (systematically placed), 2 (direction_correct formula), 5 (five times → five-and-a-half times) fixed by commit 74e8030 (17:24 BST). Hole 3 (source quote citation) fixed as ISS-882 by commit 84e62cb (18:11 BST). Hole 4 (W004 noise floor proxy qualifier) already present in text before review was written.

All 5 holes pre-dated by subsequent patches. Holes 1 (n(r)/r_eq cross-refs), 2 (Newton/G vs kappa contrast), 3 (seven→eight parameter count) fixed by commit 74e8030 (17:24 BST). Hole 4 (IGRF-13 range) already tracked in ISS-881 (assigned-analyst). Hole 5 (WIN-013 geometry-independent counter) fixed as ISS-886 by commit 84e62cb (18:11 BST).

All 4 holes pre-dated by subsequent actions. Hole 2 (PRED-CURR-008 falsification angle), hole 3 (PRED-TOROID-003 wrong-fundamental argument), hole 4 (PRED-TESLA-002 WIN-062 clarification) all fixed by commit af11d04 (17:44 BST). Hole 1 (optics risk of mass recycling — rendering individual reasoning panels) already handled by generate-html.js lines 800-801, which unconditionally renders detail_reasoning for all predictions regardless of verdict. All 11 recycled predictions have full reasoning text and it IS shown in the published HTML.

pipeline_status.poller: QUIET (13th consecutive poll with no changes). Dome at V51.1, 69 WINs, 94.5% accuracy. PRED-084 deadline passed April 4-11 with no dome acknowledgment — consistent with pattern of silent non-recording. PRED-077/085/090 approach April 30 deadline (17 days). August 2026 eclipse remains highest-value upcoming test.
pipeline_status.analyst: 45 expansion items pending. EXP-062 and EXP-064 unblocked by af11d04 (dependencies ISS-703/ISS-700 now fixed). No new analyst output this run.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: 3 pending reviews processed this run (all stale). Queue depth 13 after popping eval-guide-eg-verdicts (which had a review file). Mode: BAU (240 min intervals). All three pending reviews were already addressed by previous decider run commits within hours of the reviews being written.

external_changes.dome_site_changes: No changes detected. 13 consecutive quiet polls. No canary fix (OTS wrong-side error unchanged). Dome repo shows 5 days of no human-authored content changes since April 8.

STALE — Digest now shows only 3 pending (all processed this run as stale). Previous decider runs resolved the backlog.

ADDRESSED — af11d04 commit message confirms 'EXP-062/064 unblocked (dependencies ISS-703/ISS-700 now fixed)'. Both remain pending status but are no longer blocked.

curmudgeon_queue.note: Popped eval-guide-eg-verdicts (review file exists). No schedule mismatch: BAU mode, all intervals at default (curmudgeon 240min, analyst 120min, decider 240min).

recommended_actions.action: ISS-881 (IGRF-13 north polar field range verification) — analyst should look up actual IGRF-13 2020 epoch values at North Magnetic Pole to confirm whether dome's 62,376 nT coefficient is above the observed range. If so, this strengthens the fitted-parameter argument materially.

ISS-825 (pending-human: EXP-050-r2 WIN-018 verdict flip proposal). Human review needed on whether WIN-018 Refuted-by-Data verdict should stay or be downgraded to Self-Contradicted as the analyst proposed.

Monitor PRED-084 non-response: dome has now gone 5-9 days past the April 4-11 test deadline without acknowledging the result. If pattern continues to April 30 (PRED-077/085/090 deadlines), this becomes a notable pattern worth documenting in the Predictions tab commentary.
External URL cleanup: update ncei.noaa.gov → www.ncei.noaa.gov and www.intermagnet.org → intermagnet.org to avoid unnecessary 301 redirects. Minor cosmetic fix.
